name: image-template-social-media-post-showa-day-retro-culture-magazine-cover
title: Social Media Post - Showa Day Retro Culture Magazine Cover
description: A warm editorial-style Japanese holiday feature page combining anime character art, nostalgic Showa-era street imagery, and magazine-style informational layout for seasonal cultural promotions.
